titles.title: Norma Ruth Criswell Carpenter & Clovis C. Criswell Grant Parish Restoration Act of 2026
Norma Ruth Criswell Carpenter & Clovis C. Criswell Grant Parish Restoration Act of 2026
A bill to amend the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 to expand the new markets tax credit, and for other purposes.

action.text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Finance.
